text:
Implement an iteration governor for safety in the FreeAgent cockpit system. This feature prevents runaway agent loops and ensures safe operation.

**Context:**
- Location: s:/workspace/cockpit/
- This is part of a larger expansion to add safety features to the autonomous agent system

**Requirements:**
1. Create a new file: `cockpit/safety/iterationGovernor.js`
2. The iteration governor should:
   - Track iteration counts per agent/task
   - Have configurable max iteration limits (default: 10 for simple tasks, 50 for complex)
   - Support per-agent limits (different agents can have different limits)
   - Include circuit breaker pattern - if errors exceed threshold, pause the agent
   - Log warnings when approaching limits
   - Provide methods: `checkLimit()`, `recordIteration()`, `getStatus()`, `reset()`, `tripCircuitBreaker()`

3. Integrate the governor into the existing orchestrator flow:
   - Add to `cockpit/orchestrator.js` - check before each agent tick
   - Add to `cockpit/agents/routerAgent.js` - check before executing tasks

4. Create a test script to verify the governor works

**Output:**
- Write the code and integration points
- Signal completion with attempt_completion containing a summary of what was implemented

The user wants me to implement an iteration governor for safety in the FreeAgent cockpit system. Let me break down the requirements:

1. Create a new file: `cockpit/safety/iterationGovernor.js`
2. The iteration governor should:
   - Track iteration counts per agent/task
   - Have configurable max iteration limits (default: 10 for simple tasks, 50 for complex)
   - Support per-agent limits (different agents can have different limits)
   - Include circuit breaker pattern - if errors exceed threshold, pause the agent
   - Log warnings when approaching limits
   - Provide methods: `checkLimit()`, `recordIteration()`, `getStatus()`, `reset()`, `tripCircuitBreaker()`

3. Integrate the governor into the existing orchestrator flow:
   - Add to `cockpit/orchestrator.js` - check before each agent tick
   - Add to `cockpit/agents/routerAgent.js` - check before executing tasks

4. Create a test script to verify the governor works

2. Look at orchestrator.js to understand how it works
3. Look at routerAgent.js to understand how agents work
4. Create the iterationGovernor.js file
5. Integrate into the existing code
6. Create a test script

=== IterationGovernor Test Suite ===

Test 1: Basic initialization
✅ Governor created with simpleLimit=5, complexLimit=10

Test 2: Check limit for new agent
Result: ✅ Allowed
Status: {
  agentId: 'agent1',
  initialized: true,
  iterations: 0,
  errors: 0,
  limit: 5,
  limitPercentage: 0,
  circuitBreakerOpen: false,
  circuitBreakerOpenedAt: null,
  taskType: 'simple',
  lastResetAt: 1773087284139,
  lastErrorTime: undefined
}

Test 3: Record iterations
Iteration 1: 1/5 (20%)
Iteration 2: 2/5 (40%)
Iteration 3: 3/5 (60%)
Iteration 4: 4/5 (80%)

Test 4: Warning threshold check (60% of 5 = 3)
[IterationGovernor] ⚠️  Agent agent1 approaching limit: 4/5 (80%)
At 60% warning threshold: ✅ Passed

Test 5: Limit exceeded
[IterationGovernor] ❌ Agent agent1 has reached iteration limit: 5/5
Check at limit: ✅ Blocked correctly
Reason: Iteration limit exceeded for agent: agent1 (5/5)

Test 6: Per-agent limits
[IterationGovernor] Set custom limit for agent2: 20
Agent2 limit: ✅ Custom limit applied

Test 7: Circuit breaker
Recording errors...
[IterationGovernor] Error recorded for agent3: 1/3 - Test error 1
[IterationGovernor] Error recorded for agent3: 2/3 - Test error 2
After 2 errors - allowed: ✅ Still allowed
[IterationGovernor] Error recorded for agent3: 3/3 - Test error 3
[IterationGovernor] 🔴 Circuit breaker TRIPPED for agent: agent3 - Error threshold exceeded: 3 errors
After 3 errors - allowed: ✅ Circuit breaker tripped
Reason: Circuit breaker is open for agent: agent3. Too many errors occurred.

Test 8: Reset functionality
[IterationGovernor] Reset state for agent: agent1
After reset: ✅ Reset successful

Test 9: Complex task type
Complex task limit check: ✅ Complex limit (15) applied

Test 10: Get all status
All agents: [ 'agent1', 'agent2', 'agent3' ]
✅ Status retrieved for all agents

Test 11: Statistics
Stats: {
  totalAgents: 3,
  totalIterations: 4,
  defaultSimpleLimit: 5,
  defaultComplexLimit: 10,
  circuitBreakerThreshold: 3
}
✅ Stats retrieved

Test 12: Circuit breaker auto-reset
[IterationGovernor] Error recorded for testAgent: 1/2 - Error 1
[IterationGovernor] Error recorded for testAgent: 2/2 - Error 2
[IterationGovernor] 🔴 Circuit breaker TRIPPED for agent: testAgent - Error threshold exceeded: 2 errors
After 2 errors - blocked: ✅ Correctly blocked
Waiting for auto-reset (1 second)...
[IterationGovernor] Circuit breaker auto-reset for agent: testAgent
After reset time - allowed: ✅ Auto-reset worked

=== All Tests Complete ===

## Files Created:

1. **[`cockpit/safety/iterationGovernor.js`](cockpit/safety/iterationGovernor.js)** - Main iteration governor class with:
   - Configurable max iteration limits (default: 10 for simple, 50 for complex tasks)
   - Per-agent limits support
   - Circuit breaker pattern with error threshold and auto-reset
   - Warning logs when approaching limits (80% threshold)
   - Methods: `checkLimit()`, `recordIteration()`, `recordError()`, `getStatus()`, `reset()`, `tripCircuitBreaker()`, `getStats()`, `setAgentLimit()`

2. **[`cockpit/safety/index.js`](cockpit/safety/index.js)** - Module exports

3. **[`cockpit/test-iteration-governor.js`](cockpit/test-iteration-governor.js)** - Comprehensive test suite (all 12 tests passed)

## Files Modified:

4. **[`cockpit/orchestrator.js`](cockpit/orchestrator.js)** - Integrated iteration governor:
   - Added governor initialization with configurable limits via environment variables
   - Added `checkLimit()` call before each agent tick
   - Added `recordIteration()` after execution
   - Added `recordError()` for error tracking
   - Added task complexity detection (`_determineTaskComplexity()`)
   - Added public methods: `getGovernorStatus()`, `getGovernorStats()`, `resetGovernor()`

5. **[`cockpit/agents/routerAgent.js`](cockpit/agents/routerAgent.js)** - Integrated iteration governor:
   - Added optional governor support (graceful fallback if not available)
   - Added check before executing tasks
   - Records iterations after execution

## Environment Variables (Optional):
- `ITERATION_SIMPLE_LIMIT` (default: 10)
- `ITERATION_COMPLEX_LIMIT` (default: 50)
- `CIRCUIT_BREAKER_THRESHOLD` (default: 5 errors)
- `CIRCUIT_BREAKER_RESET_TIME` (default: 60000ms)
- `ITERATION_WARNING_THRESHOLD` (default: 0.8 = 80%)
